name: Soda Data Quality API
what_it_does: Data quality and observability platform with REST API — enabling SQL-based data checks (SodaCL language), anomaly detection, and data quality monitoring with integration into Airflow, dbt, and CI/CD pipelines, with cloud dashboard for data quality tracking.
use_cases: Running data quality checks on database tables via Soda scan API
Integrating data quality gates into Airflow DAGs or dbt workflows
Querying check results and quality score history via Soda Cloud API
Creating automated data quality monitoring with anomaly detection alerts
Building data quality dashboards on Soda check result data via API
not_for: Schema migration or database management (use Flyway or Liquibase)
ETL/ELT pipeline orchestration (use Airflow or dbt for orchestration)
Data catalog and metadata management (use DataHub or Atlan)
best_when: A data engineering team needs SQL-based data quality checks integrated into their pipeline (Airflow, dbt, Spark) with centralized quality dashboard and alerting.
avoid_when: You need data catalog, data lineage, or ETL orchestration beyond quality checks.

auth.notes: API key and secret from Soda Cloud. Base64-encoded API key:secret for authentication. Organization-scoped access. Python SDK (soda-core) for running checks. Webhook for check failure alerts. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: basic Soda Cloud, limited scans
pricing.notes: Open-source soda-core library (Apache 2.0) for running checks. Soda Cloud for centralized dashboard and alerting. Belgian company (Antwerp). Founded 2019. Backed by GV and Craft Ventures. SodaCL (Soda Checks Language) as declarative SQL checks. dbt integration popular.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for datasets, check results, scans, and agreements. API key/secret base64 auth. Webhook for check failures. Good documentation. Python SDK (soda-core) is primary interface for check execution. REST API for querying results from Soda Cloud. Open-source core is separate from cloud API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Scan execution creates new scan records. Check result reads idempotent. Dataset management idempotent by ID. Webhook acknowledgment idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: soda-core (open-source) runs checks locally; Soda Cloud API is for results and dashboard
Base64 encoding of API key:secret required — not standard Bearer token
Checks are defined in YAML (SodaCL) — understand check syntax before API use
Data connectivity (warehouse credentials) stays local — Soda doesn't access your data directly

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. Belgian company — EU-first privacy culture. Base64 auth (API key:secret). EU and US data residency. Data warehouse credentials stay local — Soda Cloud only receives check results, not raw data. Open-source core for transparency.
